chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 413 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.1805/2023 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 13-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Abdul Qadir Shaikh, Executive Engineer, Education Works Department, Khairpur >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. Perusal of the prayer clause reflects that the Petitioner has come before this Court with the grievance against the NIT published in the year, 2023. Learned Additional AG submits that the contract has already been awarded and NIT is not pending before the Department. Under the circumstances, the Petition is dismissed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
